name: Maya Chen
goals: Restore the Marigold rooftop as a shared garden
background: Studied environmental design; volunteers at the community center. Previously pitched a garden plan that stalled.

relationships.Jamal Ortiz: Works with him to navigate building logistics
relationships.Evelyn Park: Seeks her help with permit research

name: Jamal Ortiz
background: Knows the Marigold’s bones: beams, vents, skylights. Grew up nearby; cares about the tenants.

relationships.Maya Chen: Gatekeeper for rooftop access; potential ally
relationships.Theo Brooks: Keeps an eye on his tinkering for safety

name: Evelyn Park
goals: Ensure the garden’s plan is documented and compliant
Connect old neighbors with new arrivals
background: Managed the library’s local history room; knows where paperwork lives and what to ask for.

relationships.Maya Chen: Offers research support and moral steadiness
relationships.Jamal Ortiz: Shares building records; swaps maintenance lore

name: Theo Brooks
goals: Build simple sensors for moisture and light
background: Lives on the fourth floor with his aunt; subscribes to maker forums; loves salvaging parts.

relationships.Maya Chen: Looks up to her as a mentor
relationships.Jamal Ortiz: Asks for permission before testing gadgets
